name: Chocolate Chip Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 14.5 oz can Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk (do not evaporate milk)
1 cup Hershey's Mini Chips semi-sweet chocolate (divided)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 300 degrees F.
2. In a bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs, cocoa, sugar, and melted butter. Press evenly into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat cream cheese until fluffy. Gradually add sweetened condensed milk, beating until smooth. Add eggs and vanilla; mix well.
4. In a small bowl, toss half cup Mini Chips with flour to coat; stir into cheese mixture.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan. Sprinkle remaining chips evenly over top.
6. Bake for 1 hour.
7. Turn off oven; allow cheesecake to cool in oven for 1 hour.
8. Remove from oven and let cool to room temperature before serving.
9. Refrigerate leftovers.
Notes:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature before beginning the recipe.
2. To prevent cracking, cool cheesecake completely in pan on a wire rack before placing it in the refrigerator.
3. To cut cheesecake more easily, dip a sharp knife in very hot water and shake off excess before slicing.
